selection.mode: pinned external operations tool; no vendored source or binary
selection.network_behavior: only an operator-provisioned remote backend uses network access; separate-device local mode does not
selection.repository_boundary: operator-provisioned remote backend or canonical non-symlink local repository on a separately verified device; controller exposes no locator in receipts
selection.rollback: remove controller and metadata only; external repositories and snapshots remain untouched
